title: NLP-021-explain-dependency-parsing-and-its-applications.原理与应用
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-021 Explain dependency parsing and its applications.

 21. Explain dependency parsing and its applications.
答案要点:
- 定义: 分析词与词之间的语法关系
- 输出: 依存树 (有向图)
- 关系类型: nsubj (名词主语), obj (宾语), amod (形容词修饰)
- 应用:
  - Question Answering
  - Information Extraction
  - Machine Translation
  - Grammar Checking

质量评分: 90/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐

---

---

Category: NLP...
